text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I thought I heard someone calling me... It doesn't
look like anyone is here, though.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... I was hoping there would be something
exciting going on...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Ah, it's the Three Goddesses statue.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Those called by name have the legacies of past
racers passed down to them...
But in my case, would I just be inheriting the
family jinx?
